title: TriAnnot
description: Annotation software for efficient and accurate labeling of medical imaging data, supporting collaborative workflows.

title: HAID
description: A curated dataset for health AI research and development, enabling training and evaluation of medical imaging models.

title: NodMAISI
description: A model for nodule-level medical AI analysis supporting segmentation and identification tasks.

title: AI in Lung Health Detection and Classification Models
description: AI-driven models for lung health detection and classification, supporting early diagnosis and clinical decision-making.
